# Codex Handoff Artifacts

Generated Codex handoff files are written under `artifacts/codex_handoffs/generated/`.

The handoff generator writes prompt-ready files only. It does not invoke Codex autonomously.

    "prompt_package": null,
    "queue_id": "queue-implementation",

    "work_item_id": "work-

# Evidence Artifacts

Generated evidence package metadata is written under `artifacts/evidence/generated/`.

These files are local review artifacts and audit inputs. They do not approve merge, close issues, or change GitHub state.

boundary_confirmations: No network calls were performed by this command surface.
No GitHub mutation was performed by this command surface.
No queue, registry, work-item, or artifact mutation was performed unless --write-review-package was explicitly requested.

agents.name: debug-routing-agent
agents.role: Routes failed verification or testing work back to the right corrective path.

agents.name: documentation-agent
agents.role: Performs documentation-before-closeout review and source-of-truth updates.

agents.name: final-closeout-lifecycle-controller-agent
agents.role: Confirms lifecycle gates passed and prepares final closeout readiness.

agents.name: local-operator
agents.role: Human-triggered operator CLI for local inspection, artifacts, and approved local state actions.

agents.name: planning-next-issue-agent
agents.role: Selects the next approved issue and packages scope and reading inputs.

agents.name: testing-agent
agents.role: Runs or reports issue-appropriate validation commands and manual checks.

agents.name: triage-routing-agent
agents.role: Converts approved issue scope into a bounded routing and execution handoff.

agents.name: verification-agent
agents.role: Confirms that implementation output matches issue scope and requirements.

agents.name: worker-agent
agents.role: Performs issue-scoped implementation work under human review.

approval_requirements: Human review remains required for all output.
Human approval is mandatory for any governance-sensitive interpretation or action.
evidence_expectations: record limitations relevant to the task
fallback_rules: If unavailable, try another approved local model for the same task class.
If no approved local model is suitable, escalate to the human owner.
known_limitations: May produce useful review evidence without being authoritative.
Must not be treated as approval, merge, or closeout authority.

approval_requirements: Human review remains required for all output.
Human approval is mandatory for any governance-sensitive interpretation or action.
evidence_expectations: record limitations relevant to the task
fallback_rules: If unavailable, try another approved local model for the same task class.
If no approved local model is suitable, escalate to the human owner.
known_limitations: May produce useful review evidence without being authoritative.
Must not be treated as approval, merge, or closeout authority.
metadata.purpose: Local drafting, documentation support, and bounded validation evidence review.

models.name: qwen2.5:32b
models.purpose: Local drafting, documentation support, and bounded validation evidence review.

queues.name: blocked
queues.purpose: Represent work that cannot advance safely because approvals, prerequisites, or missing inputs prevent progress.

queues.name: closeout
queues.purpose: Confirm that all lifecycle gates passed and prepare final human-reviewed closeout readiness.

queues.name: corrective
queues.purpose: Hold work that failed a lifecycle gate and needs a bounded corrective pass.

queues.name: documentation
queues.purpose: Perform documentation-before-closeout review and update impacted source-of-truth documents.

queues.name: implementation
queues.purpose: Hold issue-scoped repository work while implementation changes are being prepared.

queues.name: intake
queues.purpose: Capture new approved work before detailed planning or triage.

queues.name: planning
queues.purpose: Shape approved work into a bounded issue-scoped execution target.

queues.name: testing
queues.purpose: Record issue-appropriate tests, checks, skips, and residual-risk notes before documentation.

queues.name: triage
queues.purpose: Convert the planning package into a bounded route and execution handoff.

queues.name: verification
queues.purpose: Confirm that the implementation matches issue requirements and scope.

approval_requirements: Human review remains required for all output.
Human approval is mandatory for any governance-sensitive interpretation or action.
evidence_expectations: record limitations relevant to the task
fallback_rules: If unavailable, try another approved local model for the same task class.
If no approved local model is suitable, escalate to the human owner.
known_limitations: May produce useful review evidence without being authoritative.
Must not be treated as approval, merge, or closeout authority.
